sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Qarabağ FK has shown solid form in their last 5 matches, with 3 wins, 1 draw, and 1 loss, scoring consistently (8 goals). AFC Ajax, however, has struggled, managing only 2 wins and suffering 3 losses in their last 5, with a poor defensive record (16 goals conceded in the season).

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their only recent head-to-head encounter on October 24, 2024, AFC Ajax dominated Qarabağ FK with a 3-0 victory in Baku, showcasing their attacking prowess with 2.56 expected goals compared to Qarabağ's 0.09.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Qarabağ FK ranks 21st in their league with 7 points, having scored 8 goals but conceding 9, indicating defensive vulnerabilities. Ajax, positioned at 36th with 0 points, has struggled massively, scoring just 1 goal while conceding 16, reflecting a severe lack of form.

sections.subtitle: Key Insights
sections.text: Despite Ajax's poor season stats, their recent head-to-head success and Qarabağ's inconsistent defense might give them an edge. However, Qarabağ's recent scoring form and home advantage could challenge Ajax's shaky backline.

sections.subtitle: Prediction
sections.text: While Sofascore predicts a 76% chance of a Qarabağ win, Ajax's historical edge in direct matchups suggests a closer contest. I foresee a tight match, with Qarabağ likely to capitalize on home advantage for a narrow victory.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: The first half between Qarabağ FK and AFC Ajax at the Tofiq Bəhramov Stadium in Baku ended with a 1-1 scoreline. Both teams showed attacking intent early on, with Qarabağ striking first through Camilo Duran in the 10th minute, capitalizing on their early pressure. Ajax responded late in the half with Kasper Dolberg finding the net in the 39th minute, ensuring the sides went into the break level. The match has been competitive, with both teams creating opportunities, though Qarabağ appears to have had the edge in penetrating the final third.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance breakdown
halftimeSections.text: Qarabağ FK demonstrated a strong presence in the attacking third during the first half, frequently entering the penalty area and creating a couple of notable chances. Their ball possession was slightly lower than Ajax, but they made efficient use of it by focusing on direct attacks. On the other hand, AFC Ajax held a slight edge in possession and showed resilience in duels, especially in the air. Despite fewer clear-cut opportunities, they managed to equalize through clinical finishing. Ajax also earned more corner kicks, which could be a factor in the second half if they exploit set-piece situations.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum insights
halftimeSections.text: The momentum in the first half swung back and forth between the two sides. Qarabağ FK started with promising attacking spells, pushing forward with intent in the opening minutes. Ajax responded with periods of sustained pressure around the middle of the half, gaining traction in the opposition's half. Towards the latter stages, Qarabağ regained control with consistent forays into dangerous areas, though Ajax managed to steal some momentum just before the break with their equalizer. The fluctuating dynamic suggests both teams are capable of turning the game in their favor in the second half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key players to watch
halftimeSections.text: For Qarabağ FK, Camilo Duran has been a standout performer, not only for his goal but also for his threat in the final third. Marko Janković also played a pivotal role with an assist and key contributions in midfield. On the Ajax side, Kasper Dolberg proved his finishing prowess with the equalizing goal and remains a constant danger upfront. Sean Steur's creativity in midfield, evidenced by his assist, will be crucial for Ajax as they look to create more chances in the second half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Tactical outlook for second half
halftimeSections.text: Qarabağ FK will likely continue to target direct entries into the penalty area, leveraging their ability to create big chances as seen in the first half. They might focus on tightening their defense to prevent Ajax from capitalizing on counter-attacks. AFC Ajax, with their edge in possession and aerial duels, could aim to dominate the midfield battle and use set pieces to their advantage. Their defensive organization will need to improve to counter Qarabağ's persistent final-third presence. Both teams are expected to push for a winner, potentially leading to an open game.
